description: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' is making history with every passing day at the Indian box office. Directed by Aditya Dhar and starring Ranveer Singh, the espionage thriller has crossed Rs. 790 crore in India net after eleven days, becoming only the third Hindi film ever to breach the Rs. 800 crore domestic net mark. The film is now chasing the lifetime record of its predecessor, 'Dhurandhar,' which stands at Rs. 894.49 crore — a milestone that could fall within the current week. Globally, the film is tracking past Rs. 1,079 crore and closing in on Rs. 1,200 crore worldwide, which would place it among the top three highest-grossing Indian films of all time.

title: Google ex-CEO Eric Schmidt says coding is no longer a key skill
description: 0Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt says the best programmers no longer write code—they write specs, set evaluation criteria, and let AI work overnight. Schmidt described a startup programmer whose AI finishes by 4 AM what would have taken him six months and 10 engineers at Google. He argued top programmers will become more valuable, not less, and that AI's biggest impact will be automating costly corporate operations like billing, accounting, and logistics.

title: US proposes wage increase for H-1B, H-1B1 and E-3 visas

description: Royal Challengers Bengaluru secured a dominant win over Sunrisers Hyderabad, but a controversial catch by Phil Salt, which led to Heinrich Klaasen's dismissal, sparked debate. Despite the umpire's decision, replays suggested Salt might have touched the boundary sponge. Virat Kohli's unbeaten 69 then powered RCB's successful chase of 202.

Dallas Cowboys eye Eagles legend’s son in trade twist
description: Josiah Trotter’s pre-draft workout with the Dallas Cowboys highlights growing interest in a linebacker who has quickly built a strong resume despite early setbacks. With deep family ties to the Eagles and a skill set suited to Dallas’ evolving defense, Trotter represents both a practical solution and a compelling storyline. As the Cowboys reassess a thin linebacker unit, his name is firmly in the mix.

IPL 2026: Virat Kohli scripts history, becomes the first player to…
description: Virat Kohli etched his name in IPL history, playing his 19th consecutive season for Royal Challengers Bengaluru.  He anchored RCB's chase with an unbeaten 69, guiding them to a six-wicket victory over Sunrisers Hyderabad.  Devdutt Padikkal's explosive 61 set the stage for the dominant win, while Ishan Kishan's 80 was the highlight for SRH.

title: ‘Dhurandhar: The Revenge’ makes over Rs 1,200 crore worldwide in 10 days
description: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' is performing strongly at the box office, crossing Rs 1,200 crore worldwide after a 10-day run. The action-thriller saw a significant surge on its second Saturday, contributing to its impressive domestic and global collections. The film continues the story of an undercover agent battling terrorism.

title: Tiger Woods DUI arrest sparks tension, Vanessa Trump reacts
description: Tiger Woods is dealing with both legal trouble and personal pressure after a DUI arrest report by the Daily Mail. The report claims Vanessa Trump reacted strongly and asked him to fix his situation. Woods is said to be embarrassed and considering treatment. No official statement has been made, and both his case and relationship remain uncertain.

Fact check: Did Cardi B really owe Stefon Diggs $1M?
description: Rumors linking Cardi B and Stefon Diggs went viral after a social media post claimed a fallout and a $1 million dispute. The speculation grew when an alleged deleted Instagram story surfaced. However, there is no verified proof supporting these claims. Neither party has responded publicly, and no credible reports confirm the narrative, making the controversy largely driven by unverified online speculation.

Fact check: Bradley Dack, Olivia Attwood cheating claims and marriage truth?
description: Bradley Dack is facing multiple cheating claims as several women speak out, according to The Sun. At the same time, Daily Mail reports reveal he and Olivia Attwood were never legally married despite their 2023 ceremony. The couple had planned to register later, but Olivia backed out after discovering issues, leading to their split earlier this year.

title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce NDA speculation takes dramatic twist
description: Rumors about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce enforcing strict NDAs at their wedding spread quickly after Graham Norton joked about signing them. Fans and media took it seriously, fueling speculation about a secretive ceremony. Norton later clarified it was a joke that got misreported. There is no confirmed NDA, and the couple has not shared any official wedding details yet.

PM Modi opens Jewar airport, flags ethanol push as shield against energy crisis
Delhi shocker: Gang lures man using dating app, robs him of Rs 7 lakh
description: A man was lured to a meeting via a dating app in Nehru Place, only to be abducted, assaulted, and robbed of ₹7 lakh. Five individuals, including a woman, have been apprehended by Delhi Police following a thorough investigation involving CCTV analysis and digital tracking. The victim was forced to make UPI transfers before being abandoned.

title: 15 lakh Bengal voters in limbo due to missing e-signatures
description: EC officials said 60 lakh voters were initially marked for scrutiny after a special intensive revision (SIR) of rolls, with over 700 judicial officers assigned to review them. By March 23 evening, around 29 lakh cases had been cleared. Bengal CEO Manoj Agarwal said names carrying e-signatures till 5pm would be published in the first supplementary list. The list released around midnight carried about 10 lakh names.

title: PM Modi backs ethanol blending as key to cutting crude imports
description: “Farmers’ efforts in this have given a lot of relief to the country at this time of global crisis,” he said. Ethanol production, he added, has not only benefited the nation but also farmers, with approximately Rs 1.5 lakh crore worth of foreign exchange being saved. Jewar is a gateway to the sugarcane belts of western UP. Sugarcane feedstock is a key source of ethanol.

title: Former sarpanch dies waiting 4 hours for LPG in 41°C heat in Maharashtra
description: A former sarpanch died while waiting for an LPG cylinder in Akola's sweltering heat. Shankarrao Sirsat collapsed after hours in the queue. The incident has sparked anger and questions about the administration's preparedness for essential supply. Citizens are demanding regular LPG availability. Political leaders have criticized the government's arrangements.
